raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Akabs us E-
ljafu: Efi tu mann atraddis
mans Eenaidneeks? un tas faz-
zija: Es esmu tew atraddis/ ta-
pehz ka tu sew pats efi pahrde-
wees/ taunu darriht preekſch ta
KUNGA Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Reds/ es weddischu Lau-
nu pahr tew/ un atmettifschu ta-
wus Behznahkamus/ un tsdel-
defschu no Akaba wiſu/ kas pee
Seenas meesn/ ir to Aisflehgtu
un Paneftu eeſch Israëta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es darrihtu tawu
Namimu ta patt/ ka Jerobeama
Neebata Dehla Namimu/ un ka
Baefsus Akija Dehla Namimu/
tahs Apkaitinaſchanas deht/ ar
ko tu mann efi apkaitinajs/ un
ka tu Israëlu efi darrijs greh-
foht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr Isebeli runnaja
tas KUNGS arri/ un fazzija:
Teem Sunneem buhs Isebeli
ehſt pee Jesreeles Muhrreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas no Akaba Pilsfahta
mirſt / to ehdihs tee Sunxi/ un
kas Lauka mirſt/ to ehdihs tee
Putni appakſch Debbefim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ne bija ne weens/ ka A-
kabs/ kas ſew bij pahrdewees
taunu darriht preekſch ta KUN-
GA Azzim / jo winna Seewa
Isebele pakuhdinaja winnu ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſch darrija fohti
neganti/ staigadams teem Elka-
Deeween pakkat pehz wiſu / ko
fee Amoriteei bij darrijutcht/ ko
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu Akabs Schoh
Wahrdus dsirdeja/ tad faplo-
fija wiſch fawas Drehbes/ u-
apwilke Maisu pahr fawu Me-
fu/ un gaweja/ un gulleja Ma-
ka/ un staigaja behdigi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta KUNGA Wahrd
notifke us Elijaſu to Tisbiteri/u-
fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne efi tu redſeis/ ka A-
kabs manna Preekſcha pasei-
mojahs? tapehz nu/ka tas preekſ-
mannis paseimmojahs/ tad es t
Launu ne gribbu pahr winn-
Namimu west / kamehr winſ-
dihwo/ winna Dehla Laufa gri-
bu es to Launumu pahr winn-
Namimu west.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXII. Nodalla.
Akabs zaar wilțigeem Praweescheem pewil-
eet ar Josawatu pretteem Sihrexeem Ka-
rā: 1. 29. Bet tohp nokauts / itt ka t
Praweets Mikkus papreekſchfluddinaſs : 3
Un Akasius tohp par Rehnixu winna M-
tā: 40. Josawats tas Rehnixch no Ju-
da mirſt: 41. Un Jorams nahk win-
Weeta: 51.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tee bija trihs Ga-
dus ar Meeru/ ka Ka-
ra ne bija ſarp tec-
Sihrexeem un ſarp Israëlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet trescha Gadda noga-
je Josawats tas Rehnixch i-
Juhta pee to Israëta Rehnixu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Israëta Rehnix-
fazzija us Jaweem Kalpeen-
Woj juhs ne finnaht/ ka Rahm-
ta eekſch Gileadas muns peeder-
un mehs eAam kluffu/ winnu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
